_note: Tier 7.1 perf-regression baseline. Numbers below are median-of-11 from GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest at the SHA the baseline was last refreshed against. Local boxes vary ±5x — these are only meaningful at CI parity. To bump intentionally, see docs/perf-regression-gate.md (the workflow is: one PR changes code, the follow-up PR refreshes this file with the new baseline and explains why).
_seeded_from: first ci run (gh-actions ubuntu-latest) on the seed commit; subsequent main pushes refresh nothing automatically — bump by hand when an intentional perf change lands
